groups.label: Hibernate Disable Chain
groups.interaction: These keys interact as a single hibernate posture. Partial application can leave fast startup, hiberfile sizing, and UI exposure out of sync.
groups.partial_risk: Mixed hibernate state can leave the system in a confusing partially-disabled configuration and complicate boot troubleshooting.

groups.label: Scheduler and Latency Cluster
groups.interaction: These tweaks influence scheduling, timer cadence, power boost, and latency heuristics. Their effect should be interpreted as a cluster rather than as isolated toggles.
groups.partial_risk: Applying only one value can create asymmetric power-versus-latency behavior and make benchmarks look inconsistent across runs.
